# Instructions for AI Agents

This folder contains instructions for AI agents to work on this repository.

## List of Instructions

- coding-standards.md
- architecture.md
- git.md
- testing.md
- safety.md

## How Agents Should Work

1. Read the instructions before making changes.
2. Propose a plan.
3. Make small incremental changes.
4. Run build, lint, and tests.
5. Explain the changes.
